title: humulus lupulus subsp. americanus
intro: Humulus lupulus subsp. americanus, also known as American hop, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Cannabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects, which are attributed to its essential oils, flavonoids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of American hop include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. American hop can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
